messages.text:
This is an update to scheduled meetings for Soylei: 

Shareholder meeting - mid November (annually).
    ◦ Timing is to optimize tax position for year end
    ◦ The week of Thanksgiving
Board meetings - 2nd week of June & 2 week of December
     -  Eric to arrange and send meeting invite

Development & Stage gate & Brainstorming meetings
• Michael has set the schedule already
Monthly review - this will happen monthly after we have the certified financials. 
    - Nacu will organize and send a meeting note

Weekly commercial meeting will replace the update call monday at 8:30am. This will just be Nacu, Austin, Mike and Jim...other will be asked to join as needed.
